reviews.review_text: Quite expensive
Very peaceful at night, good bathrooms
I found this park to be reasonably cheap and the lady who checked me was very friendly and helpful
Conveniently located near local bus stops and fast food restaurants
Etwas ältere Campingplatz-Infrastriktur, jedoch gepflegt und sauber. Sehr freundlicher Service. It's all you really need!
Wonderful place!!!

Stayed at park in a cabin with my daughter. Found the park to be in a great location. Very presentable, clean tidy with a sparkly pool. Individual site ensuits was great. Whilst cabins are older style, we found them to be in comfortable, clean working condition. Our cabin was serviced by housekeeping, which was a nice surprise to come back from a day out. Holiday turned into work, and we needed to extend our stay, the management were great in assisting us, we needed to move cabin, and staff were happy helping us to move cabins, so we could stay longer.
highly recommend park and will definitely stay there again.
I stayed with my family over the Christmas holidays, cabin was clean and comfortable,  pool was lovely and it was nice to be able to bbq beside it while the kids swam. We will be back.

My late wife and I stayed at this park annually for around 8 years and in the beginning it was fine but as the years went in, the state of the grounds slowly deteriorated to the point we decided we wouldn’t bother any more.
The state of the ensuites was truly sub par and his health authorities checked they would be closed as a health hazard, with rotting benches and cupboards, exhaust fans not working and so old the plastic parts were simply falling apart and the shower drains so full of hair, bits of soap and who knows what else they take ages to drain water,
One year they put us at the rear among feral permanents who tinkered with and revved motor bikes all day and into the night, and spread themselves well and truly into our site.
Unless things have improved a great deal, I suggest anywhere but here.
The owner has replied to my review suggesting I am mistaken in my review, however, I can assure you I am not.
The feral motor bike owner and his family were in a large bus with his belongings scattered widely and the owner, (or manager) when I spoke to him said he was very aware of the nuisance this tenant was causing.
I can assure the owner my late wife and I were regulars there, with our last stay 2021, the year before my beautiful wife lost her life and if the park can't find the records of our stays, maybe that says more about the bookkeeping standards than me being mistaken because my banking records aren't wrong?
While the owner may have made some improvements in the meantime, looking at the recent reviews, it is obvious much more needs to be done.

It was one of the worst caravan parks we have stayed in.
Doesn't really deserve any stars!
I had to call about our booking as we were arriving after the office closing time.
I'm pretty sure they missed our booking by the reaction of the staff member I talked to.
We arrived at a site that hadn't been mowed & a dirty ensuite with broken vanity door & mouldy internal area.
The park was very noisy all night. Quite a scary place to stay.
Wouldn't recommend holidaying here at all.
Lovely little camping, you even get your own toilet and shower when staying there on an unpowered site. Would come again
Es handelt sich um einen Campground, daher sind Zimmer und Service etwas schwierig zu bewerten.
Good little van park, ensuite and double concrete site was a real bonus...
Great friendly staff sites ensuite reasonable rates

Decent site near to both distilleries if you're in Bundaberg for their tours. Powered sites come with an en suite which was a little dated but fine for a couple of nights. A few loud dogs if you wander deeper into the site to use the dump point. Perfect for a short stay.
Such an amazing comfortable cabin. Will definitely stay there again
Sencillo y básico, pero suficiente para pasar unos días y poder lavar tu ropa, cocinar y descansar en un espacio cómodo y limpio.

The place is run down and needs maintenance. All fly screens had holes in them so no windows could be left open. We were at first put in a cabin that was a sub par standard when i complained that it was not what i booked i was told i could have a refund. I was going to take the refund but magically in the couple of minutes it took me to get my bag he was able to put us into a cabin that was the same as what i had booked. They class their cabins as one bedroom but they are a studio. The bbq had run out of gas so we could not use it.
Convenient spot came in late no troubles checking in. ensuite was a little dated but everything worked and was clean. Close to bundy distillery and kfc.

Clean. Value for money especially for larger families, our cabin had two rooms, with two double beds and two sets of bunks, 8 total. Position is not far anywhere|Close to KFC, hungry jacks etc. Front counter very friendly and helpful. Facilities clean and functional. Will definately be back.|

Arrived at the park 21 April 2024 and allotted site 33 and set up prior to rain. Roads around the park are potholed. Rainfall was about medium to heavy. Went out into the annex about7.30pm and stepped into a wading pool. I was wearing elastic sided work boots and as I walked towards the rear of the van, the water in the annex was about 50mm deep, almost over the toes of my boots. At the front of the slab, the water was about 25mm deep held back by grass. No drainage in place. I dug two small channels towards the roadway but was unable to clear the water from the rear of the slab. We had planned on staying five nights but will be confronting management in the morning to ask for a refund and intend on leaving to find somewhere else that doesn't resemble a rice paddy.

Nice tidy caravan park a little dated but the reception team were very friendly and helpful.||We had a powered site with onsuit opposite some cabins.||There are a lot of permanent campers here.||Very friendly atmosphere.||Very close to town and especially the Bundaberg Rum Distillery- Bonus.||Very reasonable rates.||

Direkt an der Hauptstraße gelegen, es ist also nicht immer leise. Ich weiß nicht, warum es 2 Betonplatten in unterschiedlicher Höhe pro Site gibt, das habe ich nicht verstanden. Bin umgeknickt und habe mir den Knöchel verstaucht. Positiv ist die Nähe zum asiatischen Restaurant Eddie Lee und zur Bundaberg Rum Destillerie. Beides ist zu Fuß erreichbar. Wir hatten eine powered site mit Ensuite Badezimmer. Das war in Ordnung, allerdings hat der Abfluss nach einer durchregneten Nacht stark gerochen.
Lovely stay. Villas a little old, road needs 4wd due to pot holes. Nice quiet place.

This is a nice clean caravan park. The cabin was clean & comfortable. The park is conveniently located & is central to town. The park is quiet at night & there is no riff raff in park.  We stayed for 2 nights Easter 2024. I would recommend staying here.

Cabin was great. Had 3 rooms 1 with bunk, I with 2 single  beds and 1 with double  bed.  Outdoor ensure which was fine by me. Plenty  of  room  for  a  family  for a week.   Had a pool here for cooling  down. Air conditioner in rooms.

myself and two friends stayed here for a day during our roadtrip and i cannot understate how much we loved it!! our cabin was incredible for such a low price, with five beds (if you count a bunk bed as two), a sun room at the entrance, and a cute little chandelier in the living room! it was quite spacious as well. outside of the cabin areas, there was also a pool we unfortunately didn't get to take advantage of due to our short stay, bit it looked really nice. the whole place looked downright lovely, especially the area near reception! tldr; the price is excellent and we loved our time here, so definitely consider this place if you're in the area!!

Nice clean caravan park with cabins. Cabin was clean and tidy. Suitable to our needs for a week visiting family. This is our second time staying here and will happily come again. Staff were friendly and nothing was a problem, even getting our cabin ready for an early check-in after travelling all night. Highly recommend.

Location excellent! Bed is super comfortable!
But no hairdryer, floor is floating, cooktop is super slow and water is sometime cold sometime hot. Other than that this cabin is very good!
Forgot to mention the staff service is outstanding!!
Fantastic park, very clean and tidy, centrally located to everything and  the private ensuite was a bonus.
Just a quick stop over but was clean and very comfortable.

Very very noisy. Industrial shed next door starts at 7am and closes at 7am. Lots of road noise. Place dosnt look anything like pictures. Needs a really good clean up. Residents in and out all night long and very noisey.

Can't review the rooms as I'm in a camper, but the park managers are lovely. The park itself is very clean and tidy. I would recommend anyone who wants to take a break to book in for a holiday here, also the occupants are very friendly and welcoming, location in good as well your 10 mins to the beach and 10 mins to town
The spaces are very tight.  Not in a nice location.

The place is close to some of the tourist attractions e.g. the Bundy Rum Distillery and the Bundaberg Barrel. The park was quiet but has a lot of permanent residents who were all OK but it changes the tone of the park. The facilities are getting a little in need of a refresh. However the park is quite safe and reasonable to stay in.

This is not a well maintained cabin park, everything really needs to be updated, having said though the Manager there "Julie-ann" is amazing, a very caring person by nature, she will try everything to fit you in and make sure things are fine. The park needs a total makeover, the guests deserve that, the owners must be making a fortune from this place, its full most of the time.
I just stayed a night in a cabin on my way through... very clean, friendly staff, hot shower, great price - what more could I ask for?

Okay, so we only paid for a powered site, but I loved the ensuite set up. Each site had it's own toilet and shower. Management was excellent and the park was well maintained. I would stay there any time. In fact we are planning on going there again very soon.
Thanks to all ,your cabin was just what I wanted and your caravan park is perfectly located it made for a great holiday, thanks again
Reception so friendly

Loved this van park. Stayed for 3+ months. Quiet and safe. Owners and caretakers we're fantastic to deal with and no problem was too much. The ensuite bathroom is an absolute bonus. Close to the rum distillery and the ginger beer factory. Would definitely stay here again.
Fantastic service and great value caravan sites.
